csv_description: Tokamak which has supplied the data.
notes: .strip() whitespace due to data quality issue (dual use of "CMOD"and " CMOD") happens automatically

csv_description: Pulse number.
Time in the pulse at which the data has been taken in s.
The plasma geometrical major radius in meters, from an MHD equilibrium fit, defined as the average of the minimum and the maximum radial extent of the plasma.
The horizontal plasma minor radius in meters from an MHD equilibrium fit.
The plasma elongation determined from an MHD equilibrium fit.
Material of the plasma facing component in the main chamber.
Material of plasma facing components on the limiters.
The vacuum toroidal magnetic field at RGEO in T.
notes: The toroidal field is measured at RGEO, which is a dynamic quantity. However, summary/global_quantities/r0 (which provides the reference point for its sibling …/b0; see: imas_description) is a constant. So we break slightly from the DD convention.

csv_description: The plasma current in A.
The plasma safety factor from the MHD equilibrium fit evaluated at the flux surface that encloses 95% of the total poloidal flux.
Line averaged electron density from a core interferometer line of sight in m-3.
Line average plasma effective charge determined from visible bremsstrahlung.
The evaporated material used to cover the inside of the vessel. BOR = boronization.
Loss Power corrected for charge exchange and unconfined orbit losses in W. PLTH=PL-PFLOSS.

Core radiation from bolometry in W. For JET and AUG this comes from a tomographic reconstruction integrated to r/a=0.95. For C-Mod this comes from the inverted emissivity profile from lines of sight horizontally looking at the midplane, integrated to r/a=1.
Plasma configuration. All TC-26 data is single null with the X-point at the bottom of the machine, noted as SN(B) or SN(L).
notes: SN, SN(B), SN(L) all collapse to LSN configuration.

csv_description: Effective mass number of the plasma fuel ions. This ranges from 1 to 3 in the database.
Separatrix surface area from an MHD equilibrium fit in m2.
Direction of the ion grad-B drift. 1 is towards the X-point.
notes: physical_base=grad_b_drift_direction, new token proposal. 1 is towards the X-point. Still problematic because of this convention.

csv_description: Divertor name for each tokamak.
Material of the plasma facing components in the divertor.
Magnetic configuration in the divertor.
1 if selected for the TC-26 high density branch scalings, 0 otherwise.
Confinement phase of the discharge at which the data is taken (LH is L-mode just before the transition).
L-H transition time in s.
Auxilliary heating method. Options are NB, IC, EC and combinations thereof.
Charge exchange and unconfined orbit losses in W.
Loss Power not corrected for charge exchange and unconfined orbit losses in W.
